brief: Can Igloo display a PDF, website, and video in one reusable session?

structure.label: Immersive workspace
structure.description: A flexible general-purpose Igloo room suited to guided demos, storytelling, and workshops.

suggested_structure_reason: A general immersive workspace is the most flexible starting point for mixed-media storytelling, launch surfaces, and repeatable demos.

assessment.recommended_route: Yes, Igloo already supports this class of content/workflow. The main thing to check is that the exact file, link, or prepared asset behaves as expected. Follow the documented workflow directly and validate the exact path in the local sandbox before broader reuse. Likely runtime path: Assemble the experience as a saved Igloo session so an operator can relaunch it consistently.; Use a WebView layer to display a local or hosted PDF document.
top_dependencies: A PDF asset stored on the Igloo Media Player or exposed by a reachable URL.
A WebView-capable layer with a reachable website URL.
A compatible video source or streaming target that the configured layer can access.
top_unknowns: Coverage gaps by concept: pdf=primary, session=primary, video=primary, website=primary, webview=primary.
The exact session structure and relaunch flow still need to be chosen for the target operator journey.
The exact PDF source, hosting path, and display scale still need to be confirmed.

evidence.title: Canvas UI - Viewing PDF Documents | Igloo Documentation
evidence.excerpt: Viewing a PDF.mp4 Viewing PDF Documents Using the File Browser Create a new WebView using the Canvas Toolbar.

evidence.title: Data types | Igloo Core Engine API
evidence.excerpt: IMAGE VIDEO SPOUT YOUTUBE WEBVIEW BLACKMAGIC DATAPATH AJAKONA5 STREAM NDI DESKTOP IGLOOWEB PDF LOOPBACK APPVIEW TIMELINE COMPOSITION CONTENTBANK HOME SessionDatabaseId identifier for a session in the database SessionId identifier for a sess

evidence.title: Canvas UI - Layers and Sessions | Igloo Documentation
evidence.excerpt: We are continuing from the previous section, which has one WebView layer already created.

assessment.practical_summary: Yes, Igloo already supports this class of content/workflow. The main thing to check is that the exact file, link, or prepared asset behaves as expected.

selected_content.title: Primary video segment
notes: Prepare the final video in a playback-ready format and confirm audio behavior.

selected_content.title: Supporting PDF or lesson document
notes: Export this cleanly for in-room readability and quick operator recall.

selected_content.title: Supporting website or WebView content
notes: Confirm the URL, reachability, and whether the operator should switch in and out of it live.
selected_content.query_hint: Supporting website or WebView content website

selected_content.title: Launch menu graphics
notes: Use this for the Home or Content Bank launch surface so switching remains clear and repeatable.

layer_drafts.label: Content Bank switcher
layer_drafts.purpose: Switch between prepared content states without leaving the operator workflow.

workflow_steps.label: Open the session and orient the room
workflow_steps.summary: Use the launch surface to start in a clean, repeatable state before switching into the main content.

workflow_steps.label: Primary video segment
workflow_steps.summary: Use this as a supporting segment in the session.

workflow_steps.label: Supporting PDF or lesson document
workflow_steps.summary: Bring this in when you need a readable reference moment such as a lesson plan, timeline, or specification sheet.

workflow_steps.label: Supporting website or WebView content
workflow_steps.summary: Use this as the supporting explainer, dashboard, or reference page in the room.

workflow_steps.label: Launch menu graphics
workflow_steps.summary: Use this for diagrams, overlays, menu graphics, or other quick-support visuals.

workflow_steps.label: Reset or return to launcher
workflow_steps.summary: End on a stable state so the next operator run starts cleanly.

recommendations.title: Lock the actual content sources
recommendations.detail: Replace the placeholder video, PDF, and website with the exact assets you want, then save them into one reusable session and test the switching order.

search_suggestions.query: Supporting website or WebView content website

demo_plan_notes: Client-facing immersive demos usually work best with one hero moment, two or three supporting beats, and one obvious reset path.
Use the room to show why the experience is spatial, not just to display more media types.
